comfortable sportswear, water bottle, proper footwear, and a positive attitude. Specific equipment or gear requirements will be shared before each coaching session."},{"_id":"a41d8518-9ba9-378b-e386-1270b1c42d1f","type":"VFlex","tag":"div","classes":["cbc99c59-aa2d-6f7e-0f46-aa1ec2490e9f","cbc99c59-aa2d-6f7e-0f46-aa1ec2490eaf"],"children":["c03b77ec-4b73-a0fc-710c-42731cb9e7e8","47ff08d7-d2dd-d338-c4bb-73e9d878e7c6"],"data":{"tag":"div","devlink":{"runtimeProps":{},"slot":""},"displayName":"","attr":{"id":""},"xattr":[],"search":{"exclude":false},"visibility":{"conditions":[],"keepInHtml":{"tag":"False","val":{}}}}},{"_id":"c03b77ec-4b73-a0fc-710c-42731cb9e7e8","type":"HFlex","tag":"div","classes":["cbc99c59-aa2d-6f7e-0f46-aa1ec2490e9c","cbc99c59-aa2d-6f7e-0f46-aa1ec2490ea8"],"children":["7947695d-c593-0c49-4407-52545381a773","58636490-440f-509d-e863-ef1b4925ef1a"],"data":{"tag":"div","devlink":{"runtimeProps":{},"slot":""},"displayName":"","attr":{"id":""},"xattr":[],"search":{"exclude":false},"visibility":{"conditions":[],"keepInHtml":{"tag":"False","val":{}}}}},{"_id":"7947695d-c593-0c49-4407-52545381a773","type":"Block","tag":"div","classes":["4206373e-8634-3d05-4dcf-bfb218fa5d7d","cbc99c59-aa2d-6f7e-0f46-aa1ec2490ebb"],"children":["40fb3085-5412-867b-5377-8995356934c7"],"data":{"text":true,"tag":"div","devlink":{"runtimeProps":{},"slot":""},"displayName":"","attr":{"id":""},"xattr":[],"search":{"exclude":false},"visibility":{"conditions":[],"keepInHtml":{"tag":"False","val":{}}}}},{"_id":"40fb3085-5412-867b-5377-8995356934c7","text":true,"v":"How Frequently asked questions about our Webflow templates

Can’t find the answer you need? Contact us anytime
Can I use these templates for client or commercial projects?

You can use the templates for multiple projects, including client work. However, templates cannot be resold, redistributed, redesigned to sell/share in any form.

Do you provide design files, such as Figma?

Yes, for select templates, we provide Figma design files to offer enhanced customization flexibility

Do you offer refunds if I’m not satisfied?

Yes. You are eligible for a full refund if you have not copied any template within 30 days of purchase. All template copies are automatically recorded for fairness and security.

Do you offer support if I need help with a template?

Yes, we offer support to all active subscribers. If your subscription expires, support access will be paused until renewal. If your subscription expires, support access will be paused until renewal - Support is available until you have subscription. Please note: Support doesn't include customization / design help.

How many templates do you add every month?

We release fresh templates every month to keep your toolkit growing. On average, you can expect 4-6 new, high-quality templates monthly, covering different niches, design styles, and use-cases—so you always stay aligned with the latest trends.

How long will my access to the templates remain active?

Access depends on your subscription. Monthly and yearly plans stay active as long as your subscription is active. With the Plus – Lifetime Access plan, your access never expires and includes all future template releases.

What information do you collect when I log in?

We only collect the basic details needed to manage your account—your name, email, and encrypted password. If you log in with Google, we receive only your verified name and email.
